latestVersion.verdictComment: Six hours after release, the bug tracker looks like a 3am incident channel. Hard pass.

referencedIssues.title: 2026.4.29: Gateway repeatedly spawns runtime-deps pnpm installs and starves event loop
Gateway event loop blocked during agent prep: max delay 32s, utilization 100%, API requests hang
TUI startup hangs at 100% CPU due to bundled plugin reload loop (2026.4.29)
[Bug]: Failed to render WhatsApp QR - Cannot find package ‘qrcode’ in 2026.4.29
`IMessageRpcClient.request()` does not handle async stdin write errors → uncaughtException → gateway crash
[Bug]: [2026.4.29] openclaw cannot accept for any input
[Discord] unresolved SecretRef at runtime despite `secrets audit` showing 0 unresolved
Bug: web_search can receive unresolved SecretRef for Gemini provider after 2026.4.29
[Bug]: Copilot 429 fail-fast fix is bypassed by session-custom stream path on 2026.4.29
Gateway event-loop saturation and very slow sessions.list/models.list on all tested versions after 2026.4.23; rollback restores stability
